detail_fields.description:
We have a 4 Bedroom Suite available in S.U.C.C.E.S.S. Affordable Housing Society (SAHS) in "The Village" (formerly the Olympic Village) on False Creek.
Rent is $3913.00 per month, in addition to the rent - you are responsible for your costs of monthly metered consumption of heat, hot and cold water usage, billed monthly via meter consumption.
This unit includes:
- Common area pay per use laundry room with washers and dryers
- With a pet deposit tenants can have one cat or one dog (with breed restrictions)
-Laundry and access to a shared laundry room
-A dishwasher
-Parking stall assigned for $75
A bit about our tenancies at this property:
• 100% non-smoking suites
• Pet friendly, family-oriented building
• Each application is required to meet eligibility standards that will require disclosure of household income and assets and include a credit check. Please note: if you own a home or a condo, or have significant assets/investments, you would be excluded from eligibility.
• We abide by The Canadian Occupancy Standards.
• Environmentally and sustainably designed building: all toilets are on a cistern rainwater harvesting system
• Amenity spaces: we have a community room that tenants can book -- free of charge -- and a roof top, food producing garden patio to enjoy
• This is a LEED certified building where the design of the building is to reduce global climate change, protect water resources, build a green and sustainable community.
**** ROOMMATES ARE NOT ELIGIBLE. ****
We show suites by appointment only, Monday-Friday between 9:00 AM and 3:30 PM. Please respond to this advertisement by email and include a bit about you and how you would fit in with the community in Olympic Village. We would like to thank you in advance for your interest. Respectfully, we receive a large volume of applicants and are unable to respond to all emails. Please note that we do not receive phone calls. We receive applicants on a first come first serve basis for all of our Rental Units.
Located along the seawall, which connects you to TELUS World of Science and into the Chinatown/ Stadium areas, our thriving neighborhood features many nearby conveniences and amenities, including shopping on Cambie, Creekside Community Center, Save on Foods Grocery, London Drugs, Medical/Dental Office, all major Banks, Liquor Store, The Village (Dry) Cleaners, Water Ferry to Rogers Arena, B.C.
